Big double room in 2 bedroom flat

Superb location! Buses from Heathrow to West Drayton approx. 15min.
Close to nature for leisure: walking or jogging by the canal or lake
West Drayton Train Station with Crossrail - 4 minutes walk which provides swift access to Central London: (20 min) Paddington, Bond Street (25 min), Canary Wharf (37 min). Crossrail is a new high-speed railway line crossing London.
8 min walk from the House to the High Street with restaurants and convenience stores: Tesco Superstore and Aldi.

Safe in the centre of international Golders Green, close to beautiful Hampstead Heath & 20 minutes from the city, this is a sunny and comfortable haven with quick access to London's bustle. The area is known for its Jewish residents & famous for its restaurants: Korean, Japanese, Chinese, many Middle Eastern hot spots, Arab haunts & tradition English pubs within 5 minutes walking distance. London Underground is 5 minutes, as is the bus station with direct access to Stansted, Luton & London.

The beautifully appointed Georgian house exudes timeless elegance and sophistication. Seamlessly blends historic charm with contemporary style. Stunning reception rooms, beautifully decorated in a modern minimalist aesthetic that enhances its natural light and generous proportions. Property offers abundance of space for relaxed living. Elegant period features are balanced with sleek, modern finishes. This is truly distinguished home that combines timeless architecture with contemporary luxury.

The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located placeA Brand New Modern Spacious 3 Bedroom Apartment With one cosy
Living/Dining Room (TV Netflix) -
Located in the heart of London,

Super Vibrant and Super Chilled Vibes.

Central Heating

This amazing spacious 3-Bedroom and 3-Bathroom house offers is a very short walk to the Thames, and restaurants, as well as a 3 minute walk from Westferry DLR and a 10 minute walk to Canary Wharf Jubilee Line station. Both stations provide easy access into the centre of London and the West End with the DLR particularly convenient for access into The City. There is a paved backyard. My house is perfect for couples or families and is close to the city centre so a great base for exploring!

In a quiet street, but a few minutes walk from Dalston, Church Street and Hackney cafes, restaurants, bars and attractive nightlife you will find my home!
Newly refurbished to very high standards it maintains most authentic features mixed with some of my favourite objects and furniture collected over years of travelling and exploring London.
I'll do my best to make you feel home and help with local tips so that you can make the most out of your stay in one of the most exciting areas of London

Welcome to this charming studio flat, a peaceful retreat for 2 guests. Featuring a comfortable bed, a mini kitchen, and a stylish bathroom, this space offers a perfect blend of elegance and comfort. Situated in a quiet, pleasant neighborhood, you’ll enjoy a relaxing stay while being just a short stroll from Clerkenwell’s delightful cafes, unique shops, and cultural highlights. Ideal for a memorable city getaway, this studio provides a serene escape with easy access to London’s best.

We are excited to offer you our rainbow guest room. It is a colouful, double room (with ensuite) in our family home- based in a brilliant London neighbourhood. The area is pretty, leafy and residential, but we also have many independent pubs, coffee shops, bars and restaurants on our doorstep. Amazing transport links- 1 stop to St Pancras (Thameslink), 2 mins walk to KT tube and many bus routes. Alternatively, if you want to escape it all then Hampstead Heath is just a short stroll away.

Welcome to Your Perfect Stay!

Our Stylish property is perfect for travelers, business guests, and families. Enjoy a comfortable stay with modern amenities, excellent transport links, and nearby shops and restaurants. Whether you're catching a flight or exploring London, this is your ideal home away from home.

Book now for a relaxing and hassle-free stay—we look forward to hosting you!
Private clean bright room in Hackney Victoria park, easy for travelling, night life and close to Victoria park room has 1 single and 1 double bed

Minutes from King's Cross Station! This ground and 1st floor flat is located in a lovely historical house!

There are 3 en-suite bedrooms, the living room has another bathroom.

New renovations! New kitchen and new laminate flooring throughout! The photos are not flattering but the flat is very bright with a view from all windows of the lovely street.

Brand new kitchen, furniture, 55 inch TV, brand new laminate flooring.

Brand new towels, bedding and cutlery in the kitchen.

**Current Photos are placeholder only - will be updated within the week**

Discover a charming 1-bed, 2-bath Marylebone retreat flooded with natural light. Enjoy a spacious living room, sleek ensuite, and comfy sofa bed for 4 guests. Elevator access, wood flooring, and ample storage enhance your stay. Explore nearby shops, bars, and Regent's Park, or unwind in style. Ideal for business and leisure travellers seeking urban elegance in the heart of London.

The apartment features three bedrooms and two full bathrooms, comfortably accommodating up to six guests—plenty of room for your family.

You’ll be just a one-minute walk from the bustling high street, all situated on a peaceful residential street.

There is elevator access, with just a short flight of stairs from the lift to the apartment.

A beautiful, recently renovated, luxurious and spacious two bedroom, two bathroom apartment set in this charming mansion block on West End Lane, minutes away from West Hampstead underground and overground stations and easy transport links to Heathrow, Gatwick and Luton airports and a 15 minute bus ride to Oxford St. The property benefits from parking on site, a day porter and a lovely garden at the front.

A cosy 3 bedroom house in West Ealing. Close proximity to several supermarkets and restaurants in Ealing Broadway, West Ealing & Northfields. Excellent public transport links to Paddington, Central London via the Picadilly & Central Lines, Wembley Stadium and Heathrow.
Included amenities: Wifi, Welcome Pack, Toiletries, Area Tips, Cleaning, Fridge Fill Service, Cafetiere, 24/7 Support.

This modern, spacious 2BR flat is just 5 minutes from vibrant Upper Street and only 2 minutes from Highbury & Islington Station, offering fast links across London. Also, a short 10-minute walk to Holloway Road Tube, this bright and quiet apartment sits in a stylish new building with access to a large, peaceful community garden.

Welcome to my bright and classical one bedroom apartment , just steps from the Thames and Battersea Park.

Spacious , recently refurbished and situated on a quiet road. This property is ideal for couples and friends as well as business trips. The property is in a great location to enjoy all that Chelsea/Battersea has to offer whilst also having the benefits of being served by great transport links into central London. The infamous Battersea Park Road is right on your doorstep, and so much more

Find the perfect place to start your adventures in London! This big one-bedroom apartment fits up to four people, with a sofa bed in the living room. Whether you're traveling alone, as a couple, or with a small family, this spot is perfect for your stay. It's on the second floor (no elevator, but the view is great!) and is close to stations like Covent Garden (Piccadilly line), Leicester Square (Northern line), and Holborn (Central line). Your London trip starts here!

New! One bedroom apartment right in the heart of vibrant Soho but surprisingly quiet. Sleeps 4 in one double bed in bedroom and one double sofabed in lounge.

Amazing location, walking distance to all the sights, surrounded by bars, restaurants, shops and theatres.

1st floor, 15 steps, no lift/elevator.

IMPORTANT If you are 2 guests and require the sofabed there will be an extra laundry/linen fee of 50 pounds, please let us know when you make you reservation so we can request this via Airbnb

Self contained studio apartment on the ground floor of the building with a standard double bed, kitchenette well equipped for basic cooking, ensuite small bathroom with a walk in shower/ toilet and dining table suitable for 2 people.

Just a minute from Euston station, 10 minutes from kings cross station and a 15 minute walk from Camden's buzz. The location allows your to explore the city at ease and perfect for working professionals,couples, or friends.

Stay in the heart of Maida Vale in this cozy, lower-ground studio in a grand period building. The space includes a spacious sleeping/living area, modern kitchen, and bathroom with WC. Self-contained studio.

- 15 mins to Soho
- Walk to Abbey Road, Hyde Park, Notting Hill
- Easy transit: Warwick Avenue, Royal Oak, and Bayswater tube stations within a 15-min walk.
- Enjoy style, comfort, and prime city access—your perfect London base awaits!

Excellent location. Entire private flat.  Victorian split level conversation. Double bedroom. Own kitchen and bathroom (both are dated). You will be the only guest(s). Overlooking quiet gardens. Tree lined street. All shops, cinemas, restaurants 1 minute walk. Heathrow 20 minutes by taxi and 30 via tube. The Hammersmith (Picadilly Line) is s 15 minute walk. Nearest Underground station  Shepherd’s Bush Market 5. White City 10 minutes. Check in after 11.30am / out before 11.30am

My place is close to WEST FIELD SHOPPING CENTRE, THE OLYMPIC PARK, HOMERTON OVERGROUND STATION, HACKNEY MARSHES. You’ll love my place because of the cosiness, the kitchen, and the comfy bed. My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travellers, and families (with kids).

Spacious and bright flat in South East London, filled with natural light.  Perfectly located in town, just steps from shops, supermarkets, cafés, gyms, and swimming pools. Excellent transport links — reach Central London in just 25 minutes by Tube or Overground.

Compact and comfortable flat in East London (E9), ideal for solo travellers.

Set on a lively social housing estate with life around the clock — guests should expect some inner city noise day and night and this is reflected in the price. If you’re sensitive, earplugs or headphones can help.

Third-floor, modern bathroom and wall bed.

Close to Chatsworth Road cafés, Hackney Marshes, and Hackney Central (5 mins).

Homerton Overground 8-min walk.

Friendly, diverse, multicultural neighbourhood

Have fun with the whole family at this stylish place!
The apartment is located 5 min walk distance to Brentford Station
20 min via train to Heathrow airport and 40 minutes via train to Central London
On the street we have a lovely Pub called The Globe where you can serve lunch and dinner
Kew Garden is 15 min via Bus number 65
Comfy Loft apartment in leafy Twickenham. Happy to show around on weekends/give local advice.

Blenheim Lodge was built in 1878 when there were only horses and coaches travelling on the roads. If you are travelling by car we have off road parking in front of our house. East Finchley is a safe friendly area. Our house is about five minutes walk to the tube train station, shops, pubs and restaurants. There are parks nearby and the Phoenix cinema is the oldest continually running cinema in England.
Your family or group of friends ( work colleagues) will be close to everything when you stay at this centrally-located place.
The apartment is located in an excellent location within walking distance to Leicester Square station.

This is a guest only hotel, situated right next to St George’s Hospital. This is a stay like a hotel; with all the convenience, but without the high price tag. At this home you will enjoy a relaxed atmosphere of a guest only experience. Where all the shared spaces are cared and maintained by me and my fantastic colleagues.

Enjoy your stay in London with a perfectly located Zone 1 Apartment

+Just 20 minutes walk from London Bridge!

+ 2 mins walk from Elephant & Castle tube station servicing Northern and Bakerloo tube lines

+ Exclusive use of the whole flat with balcony

+ TV, Netflix and Broadband included

+ Shops, restaurants and bars all within a short walking distance

A cozy little room in our quiet & clean home. Good access to Central London as well as Harry Potter Studio. Wembley itself is also a vibrant area.
You have your own house key for 24hrs access.
A short walk to Wembley Stadium Station where you can take a train, only 9 minutes to Marylebone(Zone1).
There are 2 tube stations nearby, 11 minutes to Baker St(Zone1).
Also 24/7 direct bus to City Centre(bus 18/N18).
For more detailed travel info, see 'Getting Around' on this listing.

My home is my safe place, but I’m more than happy to share it with people eager to explore London. It’s perfectly placed with speedy transport links into the city centre, and all the necessities nearby, but far enough away to give it a little peace and quiet.

It’s a cosy flat - bedroom, bathroom, kitchen and a living room that has two sofas, a tv, a small desk to work from and a dining table. It also has a beautiful balcony with plants and space to sit in the sunshine.

I am pleased to invite you to my professionally managed bright 1 bedroom apartment, perfect for couples, friends, and those on business trips. Located between two of the most sought-after neighbourhoods in London: Paddington and Bayswater, this place boasts excellent travel links across London:
Hyde Park - 10 min walk
Kensington Gardens - 7 min walk
Oxford Str - 13 min
Big Ben - 25 min
V&A Museum - 18 min
Green Park - 15 min
Enjoy this home away from home and benefit from its great location!

Modern and clean flat on the 4th floor of a building built in 2008. Peaceful view overlooking London Fields. 2 minutes from Broadway Market and all it has got to offer. Sleeps 4 comfortably and has a fully equipped kitchen.
You'll have a great time at this comfortable place to stay.

Small but light filled recently renovated 2 bedroom house with multiple transport links to central london. The house is off of main road in a cul de sac with just 5 other houses. Its very quiet with ample parking and a private backMayard.
Good wifi, helpful neighbours and just a 7 min walk to Peckham high street- the coolest place in London and the 11th in the entire world! https://www.timeout.com/london/news/weve-found-londons-coolest-neighbourhood-and-its-not-hackney-092118
Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space.

Discover the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in our modern 1-bedroom apartment, nestled in the heart of Earl's Court. Ideal for solo adventurers, couples, or business travellers, this serene haven offers a peaceful retreat with the luxury of a private outdoor patio, all just moments away from West Brompton Station and the vibrant local amenities of Earl's Court.

A unique loft space with en-suite, kitchenette and sitting area in the heart of Putney. You are just minutes away from local tubes, trains, buses and amenities. We also have a beautiful garden guests are welcome to use. Parking is available. Please note that there are 2 flights of stairs to access the room and there are sloping ceilings in the bedroom and bathroom.

Stylish, spacious and well equipped place with excellent transport connections, very convenient for longer stays.

Local cafes/bars/lovely pub/artisan bakery all 2-5 mins walk & with beautiful GREEN and LAKE views as sits across from the PARK.

City of London / Zone 1 (Liverpool Street station) in 10 Mins by train! Public transport seconds away and 3 minutes by train to Stratford, transport super-hub for the rest of London.

Welcome to your cozy, practical home-away-from-home in E14 East London, perfect for professionals, contractors, and leisure.

This spacious 3-bedroom is located just minutes from Canary Wharf and offers everything you need for a productive, comfortable, and relaxing stay. It includes a personal home gym, a dedicated work area, fast Wi-Fi, and free on-street parking (permit provided). Whether you’re in town for work, events at the O2 or ExCeL, or a longer stay, this property ticks all the boxes.
Centrally located stylish 3 bedroom plus office house.

Welcome to my cosy home! I want you to feel at home so just ask & I will do my best to get you everything you need! Camberwell-an arty neighbourhood famous for the SLA Gallery & art uni’s has great independent cafes!Only 30 minutes from the buzz of the West End by public transport, my Victorian home is peaceful and cosy. If you love to walk, the River Thames is a neat 35 minute walk away! The street is quiet, for a perfect nights sleep! Breakfast included!Fresh coffee, toast & smoothies!

A beautiful, bright and spacious 2 bedroom flat with an open plan living room and kitchen. The second bedroom and conservatory have double doors that open out to a wonderful garden - a paradise in the heart of London.

The flat is a short walk from Portobello Road, Notting Hill and Little Venice. It has excellent transport links (tube, overground and bus) taking just 20 minutes to reach central London from nearby Queens Park station.

A perfect place to stay to explore like a true Londoner.

Welcome to your London retreat in the heart of West Kensington. The bright and well decorated two-bed flat offers the perfect mix of comfort and convenience.

Great travel links, with West Kensington and Barons Court tube stations minutes away, and 15-20 minutes from central London.

A stones throw from Olympia, which hosts numerous shows, fairs and events from food, jewellery, comic con and wider industry events.

The flat is freshly renovated and in perfect condition!

Stylish apartment throughout. Renovated to a high specification with small touches to make your stay stressfree and enjoyable.  The train station and supermarket is an 6-8 minute walk away for ease of transportation and food.

This is a beautiful victorian 1 bedroom apartment.
Its a garden floor situated in a very nice and quiet area. Close to transports and walking distance from Greenwich and Blackheath.

Experience luxury in this modern 2-bed, 2-bath getaway. Featuring a spacious balcony, sleek decor, and a fully equipped kitchen, this apartment is perfect for relaxation or exploring the city. Conveniently located next to Colindale Station, with easy access to shops, dining, and transport links. Ideal for couples, families, or business travelers!

Experience the best of London in this elegant and spacious studio located in the vibrant Paddington area. Set within a charming historic building, this stylish flat features a luxurious Super King bed, a relaxing jacuzzi, and a fully equipped kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances. Just moments from Hyde Park and excellent transport links, it's the perfect base for both short and extended stays.

An airy and light split level flat on Regent's Canal right opposite the ever popular Broadway Market and London Fields in Hackney, with a large amount of open garden space (both private and communal).
Enjoy easy access to everything from this perfectly located home base. Located right on Latchmere road close to the famous Fox and Hounds pub

This exclusive London apartment welcomes you, benefitting from exclusive lake views overlooking the London skyline, Olympic stadium and Abba arena will ensure that you have a memorable and comfortable stay whether its a short or long term stay with us. It comes fully equipped and tastefully decorated to cater to all your needs.

Being a top floor apartment with a large balcony accessible from the bedroom and the living room it provides privacy aswell as unobscured views of London City.

This double room stands out with its distinctive style, combining comfort and character. The room features a cozy bed and a TV for your entertainment, allowing you to unwind with your favorite shows. Despite its shared toilet, the thoughtfully designed space ensures privacy and convenience. Every detail is curated to create a harmonious atmosphere, making it an inviting retreat for relaxation and rest. Enjoy a unique blend of charm and modern amenities in this exceptional room.
This bright and airy studio in the cultural and political heartland of London with all amenities, a private balcony / patio and daily housekeeping (available at extra cost of £10 a day).

The apartment is located on the third floor of an upmarket Art Deco serviced building. The apartment features a large bathroom, a separate bedroom, small kitchen and spacious living / sleeping area. The property features of classic elegance such as original fireplaces and a wood-panel library room.

property also features its own movie room, 24-hour room service and a gym. Guests can relax in the drawing room or enjoy a drink in the Oscar Bar and Restaurant.

The property is just a 5 minute walk from Tottenham Court Road Underground Station.

This lovely garden room has just been redecorated and is unique with a style of its own.The flat is very clean, beautiful and feels spacious and has a nice garden.

The area is very multicultural, with shops and two lovely parks just round the corner.
You are welcome to use the open plan kitchen/lounge and garden.

This apartment is part of a brand new development in a trendy, modern style, with new furniture and interiors. The apartment is located on the first floor. It opens up directly to the living and dining area, with a comfortable sofa. The kitchen is located next to the living area in an open-plan space and it comes fully equipped. There are two bedrooms with double beds and high quality mattresses and one bathroom. There is a also a small outside balcony.

Large and lovely Victorian sunny double bedroom with direct access to the garden this peaceful yet in the heart of trendy and lively Hackney. Well connected to central London via buses or overground.
This is an old victorian townhouse and you would be sharing with two gay guys who are best friends and we have a sweet toy poodle dog.
We share bathroom, kitchen and there's no living room. We usually socialise out in the local pubs, bars or fantastic restaurants nearby.
We are friendly and clean.

Hello lovely Airbnb team :)

Good place to stay for visiting London ( 35 min. by underground into city centre)  15 min. walk to underground station. Residential quiet area, buses to Wembley and Heathrow.

This is a spacious apartment in Bow, in a great location. Close to shops and transport, it’s easy to get around. The apartment has everything you need and is very comfortable. I’m the landlord and make sure it’s always clean and ready for you. You’ll love it here!

Thanks and looking forward to hearing from you,

Danielle

Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located two floor place. 15 mins walk to shoreditch and 7 minute walk to Angel. Also walking distane to The barbican, Kings Cross, Angel canal. Amazing location and great transport links.

Stylish 1 bedroom well equipped apartment minutes away from Portobello Market, buzzy Golborne Road and Notting Hill. Ideal for single person, or couple. Queensway OR Bayswater stations are no more than 4 minutes walk from this property. Hyde Park is only 3 minutes walk , You will really love the area.

Located in the heart of London, mere steps away from Trafalgar Square, this home offers a vibrant locale surrounded by an array of restaurants, cafes, and theaters!
Beautifully modern 3 bedroom duplex apartments right in the centre of London — just 2 minutes walk from Covent Garden and walking distance to Leicester Square, Piccadilly Circus and Soho.

Near all points of interest in city centre, walking distance to one of the best leisure centres in the city and within a short walk to many shops and restaurants. A great place to stay to explore London and all it has to of

This is a STUNNING and LUXURIOUS 3 Bedroom 2 Bathroom apartment with Balcony in a PRIME location in central london, just few steps from High Street Kensington, walking distance to Earls court,

Quiet double bedroom with en suite bathroom in a modern, semi-detached house a 3 minute walk to the River Thames. Gated estate, secure, with private parking. Bottled water. Shampoo/conditioner/shower gel. Clothes steamer and hair dryer.

Enjoy easy access to popular shops and restaurants from this charming place to stay.  The hotel is about 5 minutes to the Earl's Court Road Station, there are local buses around the hotel.  Business travellers will be within walking distance of Olympia Exhibition Centre and the hotel is close to the A4 for direct access to Heathrow airport.

Welcome to your ideal urban retreat! This beautiful apartment is situated in a prime location to explore London with close links to central London and Heathrow Airport. There are plenty of local restaurants, bars, pubs and shops within a 5-10 minute walk with the Elizabeth Line being no longer than a 10-15 minute walk. The property comprises an open plan kitchen and living area with a bedroom including a king size bed There is also a double sofa bed if needed/if four people are wanting to stay.

Welcome to this bright and modern 1-bedroom apartment perfectly located in North West London, just moments from Brent Cross Shopping Centre. Situated within walking distance of Cricklewood Overground Station (only 10 minutes away), this property offers excellent transport links and access to a range of shops, cafes, and local amenities.
